svg.title: PL/SQL Packages — Procedure vs Function
svg.desc: Infographic showing procedure package, function package, overloading, spec vs body, and calling syntax differences.
svg.text: sals package · spec + body · overloading · calling syntax
No RETURN — called as a statement, no result
RETURN number — assigned to a variable
← result assigned, type must match RETURN number
FUNCTION name(p) RETURN t · result := sals.name(v)
